block.title: LookingGlass Cyber Scout Query Setup Options
block.text: In order for this application to utilize LG services, you must have a valid Scout API Token. Email support@lookingglasscyber.com if you are a current customer and do not currently have a Scout API Token. If you are not currently a customer of LookingGlass, please contact our Sales team via phone at (888) 726-8893 or via email at support@lookingglasscyber.com to obtain demo credentials.

input.label: LookingGlass Cyber Domain: Enter the FQDN of your LookingGlass API server (e.g. company.lgscout.com instead of https://company.lgscout.com)
The query string that you want to use to pull back data via the Scout API
Enter in the time window that you would like to use for the query to pull back data over in minutes(Default: 15 minutes)
Enter in the time delay in minutes the query should go back to ensure data has been imported into ScoutPrime(default: 1440 minutes(1 day))

block.title: LookingGlass Cyber Scout Feed Proxy Configuration

input.label: Enable SSL Certificate Verification(NOTE: Splunk needs to be restarted for this setting change)
Enter the proxy server address (e.g. mycompany.proxy.com:8080, not http://mycompany.proxy.com:8080)
